title: Port custom rc.conf g-prefix destinations; chord ambiguity timeout commit
description: User ported ~/.config/ranger/rc.conf custom goto bindings (gdoc/gdes/gdow/gcli/gdat/gzid/gpda/gscr/gacv) and needed prefix-collision timeout commit for gd vs gdoc/gdat/etc.
close_reason: Refactored chord engine: prefixes derived from chordActions, with AMBIGUOUS_COMMIT_MS (500ms) timeout for combos that are both a complete action and prefix of longer action (gd vs gdoc). Added user's custom g-prefix destinations from rc.conf.

title: Ranger-complete keybindings
description: Map bindings to ranger defaults: gh/ge/gu/gp/gs/go/gv/gd/gm/gM/g/ quick cds, H/L history, Ctrl+D/U/F/B page scroll, n/N search repeat, f quick-find, po/pl/pL/phl paste variants, a/A/I rename variants, s shell, uv/um/ut unmark, ga restore tab, or toggle reverse, oM/oS/oN/oC/oE reverse sorts, Q/ZZ quit.
close_reason: Ranger-complete bindings landed. All motion, goto shortcuts, paste variants, rename variants, history, page scroll, search repeat, quick-find, shell, tag/bookmark chords, sort variants, tabs. See end-of-task summary.

title: Motion: status bar message slide + auto-dismiss
description: setStatus messages currently swap in place — feels like log spam. Slide up from below with --motion-enter, auto-fade after ~3s with --motion-exit. Touches src/components/Statusbar.tsx/css and possibly store.tsx (may want timestamp on status for auto-dismiss timer).

title: Motion: bulk operation completion pulse
description: After bulk rename/trash/copy/move completes, briefly pulse the affected rows with --motion-celebrate. Confirms 'something real happened'. Hook into the operations in src/actions.ts and App.tsx command handlers.

title: Motion: context menu origin-anchored reveal
description: The .ctx-menu currently appears with no animation. Animate scale-in from 0.94→1 + fade, with transform-origin set to the cursor position (so it appears to grow from where you clicked). Use --motion-reveal. Touches src/components/FileRow.tsx (where ctx menu is rendered) and FileRow.css.

title: Motion: mark/yank/tag state transitions
description: Toggling a mark should thwack briefly with --motion-pop (spring). Yanked rows should fade to 0.55 opacity over --motion-select rather than instantly. Tag add/remove should fade. Touches src/components/FileRow.tsx/css.

title: Motion: miller column slide-in/out on navigation
description: When trail grows (cd into dir), new column slides in from the right using --motion-slide. When trail shrinks (cd ..), the dead column slides out. Currently columns pop into existence and only the scroll position smooth-scrolls. This is the app's signature interaction — pushing a card onto a stack. Touches src/components/MillerColumns.tsx and MillerColumns.css. Must interrupt cleanly when user navigates rapidly.

title: Motion: settings panel as slide-in drawer
description: Settings currently renders as a centered overlay. Premium apps treat settings as a drawer — slide in from the right edge using --motion-slide, backdrop dims with --motion-enter. Touches src/components/Settings.tsx/css.

title: Theme: Alpine dusk as default (nature)
description: Replace default palette in src/styles/tokens.css with 'Alpine dusk / mountain lake' nature theme: deep slate-blue backgrounds, glacier teal accent, twilight violet secondary, alpenglow pink/amber for file-type accents, aurora-tinted shadows. Retune light theme as 'mountain morning mist'. Must preserve all existing token names since components reference them — only values change.
close_reason: Closed

title: Implement sentence-chips overlay as real command UI
description: Replace the  CommandPrompt with the sentence-chips overlay (prototype 03). Context-aware: disable verbs that can't run right now (e.g. Paste when clipboard is empty, Move when no files), show reason on hover/focus. Tab advances slots, numbers pick options, typing filters, Enter executes.
close_reason: ChipPrompt implemented with context-aware verb availability, greyed-out disabled verbs showing reason on hover, slot-filling flow (verb→object→destination), Tab/Enter/1-9 picks, typing filter, backspace to retreat

title: Motion: drag source pulse + drop settle
description: While a drag is active, the source row should subtly pulse/breathe with accent-glow (this is the app's differentiator — deserves polish). On successful drop, a brief --motion-pop settle confirms. Currently .row--dragging is a static opacity/bg change. Touches src/components/FileRow.tsx/css.

title: Motion: thumbnail fade-in on load in grid view
description: Grid view thumbnails load async. Fade each one in with --motion-reveal as it resolves. Touches src/components/FileGrid.tsx/css.

title: Motion: tab open/close/switch animations
description: Tab open: width grow from 0. Tab close: width collapse + fade using --motion-exit. Active-tab switch: animate the accent underline/glow sliding between tabs (shared-element style) rather than restyling in place. Touches src/components/Tabbar.tsx/css.

title: Motion: overlay enter/exit polish
description: Upgrade overlay animations in src/App.css. Current: .overlay fade + .overlay__box pop (scale 0.98, 4px). Exit: nothing — overlays just vanish. Upgrade to: --motion-enter for entry (scale-from 0.94, backdrop blur-in), --motion-exit (ease-in, faster) for dismissal. Requires two-phase unmount (AnimatePresence-style) since overlays are conditionally rendered in App.tsx. Applies to RenameOverlay, MkdirOverlay, QuickFindOverlay, ShellOverlay, Settings.

title: Zero-friction command overlay with inline completion
description: As the user starts typing (no modifier key, no leading :), a Spotlight-like overlay appears showing matching commands and natural-language intents. Supports two mental models simultaneously: (1) terse chords/commands for power users, (2) full sentences like 'move this to Downloads' or 'go to Desktop' for non-technical users. Completion is fast, keyboard-first, highly visible. Natural-language templates map to the same primitive actions as the chord system. Must feel delightful — animation, visual hierarchy, and teaching-by-showing when the user hesitates.
close_reason: Sentence-chips won the design review; shipped as ChipPrompt

title: Design exploration: HTML variations for fast NL keyboard UX
description: Produce 4-6 standalone HTML prototypes in tmp/design/ exploring different approaches for the zero-friction command overlay. At least one Spotlight-style. Other variations should explore fundamentally different interaction models (sentence-builder chips, template slots with tab-advance, inline ghost completion, predictive phrase grid, etc.). Goal: showcase how non-technical users can type at expert speed via natural language + aggressive completion.
close_reason: Created 5 HTML prototypes in tmp/design/ (spotlight, ghost-text, sentence-chips, predictive-grid, cascading-columns) plus index page

title: Motion: tracking selection pill in file rows
description: Replace per-row background repaint with a single selection indicator that animates transform: translateY between rows using --motion-select. Feels like a physical highlight tracking the cursor. IMPORTANT: when j/k is held (rapid repeat nav), do not animate — only animate discrete moves. Touches src/components/FileRow.tsx/css and MillerColumns.tsx (may need a sibling indicator element per column).

title: Motion: grid↔list view-mode cross-fade
description: Toggling viewMode between grid and list currently swaps the rendered component. Cross-fade with brief scale using --motion-toggle so the mode change feels deliberate. Touches src/components/MillerColumns.tsx.

title: Destination search: recents + Spotlight + exclude list
description: Chip overlay destination slot currently only knows Home subdirs + bookmarks + immediate subdirs. Add: (1) persisted LRU of recents, (2) mdfind-backed async folder search, (3) exclude list for node_modules/.git/caches/etc., (4) ranking that blends recents > curated > Spotlight.
close_reason: Added recents LRU (30, persisted), mdfind-backed findFolders IPC with noise-path filter (node_modules, .git, .cache, Library/Caches, package caches, etc.), debounced 150ms async search in destination slot, ranked as: recents > curated > bookmarks > subdirs > spotlight

title: Motion: semantic design tokens foundation
description: Add two-layer motion token system in src/styles/tokens.css: primitive tokens (--dur-instant/fast/med/slow/xslow, --ease-out/in/in-out/spring/emphasis) and semantic tokens (--motion-hover, --motion-press, --motion-focus-ring, --motion-select, --motion-toggle, --motion-reveal, --motion-enter, --motion-exit, --motion-slide, --motion-reorder, --motion-pop, --motion-celebrate). Rule: components reference semantic tokens only, never primitives. Extend prefers-reduced-motion override to neutralize transforms in addition to zeroing durations. This unblocks all other motion work.
close_reason: Landed two-layer motion tokens in tokens.css (5 durations, 5 easings, 12 semantic tokens). Migrated all component CSS from primitives to semantic tokens; grep confirms zero --dur-*/--ease-* leakage outside tokens.css. Extended prefers-reduced-motion to neutralize animations globally.

title: Motion: mode-line cross-fade on mode change
description: Current ModeLine just text-swaps between normal/find/command/visual. Cross-fade + tiny translate using --motion-toggle gives a sense of 'gearing up'. Touches src/components/ModeLine.tsx/css.

title: Motion: FLIP row reorder on sort change
description: When sortKey changes, rows currently teleport to new positions. Use FLIP technique (First-Last-Invert-Play): measure row positions before change, let React rerender, measure after, apply inverse transforms, then animate to identity with --motion-reorder. Highest 'wow' item but most complex — needs layout measurement via refs. Touches src/components/MillerColumns.tsx and FileRow.tsx.

title: fm v1 — cross-platform ranger-inspired file manager with drag-out
Scaffold Electron + React + Vite + electron-builder
description: Initial project skeleton: Electron main process, React renderer via Vite, TypeScript, electron-builder config. Target: 'npm start' launches empty window on Mac.
close_reason: Scaffolded Electron + React + Vite + TS + electron-builder. Dev server boots, Electron window launches, tsc -b clean, vite build clean. Design foundation (tokens, base styles, titlebar, pathbar, miller columns with sample data, statusbar) in place.

title: Bookmarks: m<letter> to set, `<letter> to jump
description: Persist bookmarks to settings file. Supports a-z and 0-9.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: Settings UI for keybindings + right-click 'bind this folder to key'
description: GUI settings panel to view/edit all keybindings. Right-click on any folder shows 'Bind to key...' which prompts for a letter and stores the bookmark. Editable JSON file as source of truth.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: Right-click Open With menu + sensible defaults
description: Right-click shows 'Open', 'Open with...' submenu. Ship sensible defaults per extension (editors, viewers); fall back to macOS 'open' (LaunchServices) if no override. User-configurable in settings.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: Bulk rename via $EDITOR
description: Dump selected filenames to a tempfile, open in $EDITOR, apply renames on save. Standard ranger :bulkrename flow.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: File tagging (t to tag, persistent)
description: Tag files with a single-char symbol. Persist tags in a sidecar file per root. Show tag in listing.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: Miller columns layout (parent | current | child-preview)
description: Optional three-column layout showing parent dir, current dir, and preview of focused child (listing only — no file content preview in v1).
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: Package with electron-builder (.dmg + .zip)
description: electron-builder config producing unsigned .dmg and .zip artifacts for macOS. Automate via 'npm run dist'.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: Publish as Homebrew cask via personal tap
description: Create github.com/vivekdse/homebrew-tap. GitHub release with artifacts + sha256. Cask file referencing the release. Users install via 'brew tap vivekdse/tap && brew install --cask file-manager'. Quarantine stripped by cask → no Gatekeeper warning for unsigned app.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: CI: GitHub Actions to build + release on tag push
description: Workflow that runs electron-builder, creates a GitHub release with .dmg/.zip, computes sha256, and opens a PR to homebrew-tap updating the cask.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: [DEFERRED] Preview pane for text/images/code
description: Explicitly deferred per user — revisit after v1 ships.

title: Basic file listing and directory read
description: Read a directory with Node fs, render entries in a scrollable list. Show name, size, mtime. No icons yet.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: [DEFERRED] Linux packaging (AppImage/deb)
Navigation: hjkl, arrows, Enter to open, Backspace to go up, gg/G, /
description: Vim-style navigation. Enter opens files via native OS handler (macOS 'open'). Directories open in-place. / opens a quick filter.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: Selection, copy/cut/paste, delete, rename
description: Space marks; v inverts; uv clears. yy/dd/pp for copy/cut/paste with a selection buffer (cross-tab). dD deletes (with confirm). cw renames in place.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: Drag-out to external apps (Slack, Gmail, Finder)
description: The whole reason for this project. Use Electron's webContents.startDrag({file, icon}) from ondragstart. Must produce a real native drag session that Slack/Gmail web accept as a file drop.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: Sorting: name/size/mtime/ctime/extension, reversible (on/os/ot/oc/oe, uppercase reverses)
description: Ranger-style sort keybinds. Persist per-directory sort preference.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: View modes: list and thumbnail grid
description: Toggle between list view and thumbnail grid. Thumbnails for images; generic icons for other types. No file-content preview pane in v1.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: Tabs with independent cwd (gt/gT/g<n>)
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: Command mode (:) with tab completion
description: : opens a command bar. Built-ins: :mkdir, :touch, :chmod, :cd, :rename, :bulkrename, :shell. Tab-completes commands and paths.
close_reason: Implemented in single landing. See end-of-session summary.

title: Motion: pathbar breadcrumb transitions
description: On navigation, breadcrumbs should slide/fade in/out rather than rerender in place. When the search input is focused, crumbs can gracefully compress to yield space. Touches src/components/Pathbar.tsx/css.

title: Fix sort and view-mode chords not taking effect
description: User reports 'sort and views are not working'. The chord wiring (on/os/om/wl/wg → setTab) looks correct on inspection. Need to reproduce in dev and fix whatever is actually broken. Likely candidates: (a) chord handler swallowing keys before commit, (b) setTab patch not re-rendering MillerColumns, (c) grid view only applies to last column by design but user expected all columns.
close_reason: Added sort/view command aliases (date/modified/newest/etc), status feedback for all sort/view/hidden chord changes, and inline completion dropdown in command prompt

title: Motion: staggered row fade-in on directory load
description: When entriesByPath gets populated, stagger-fade the rows in using --motion-enter (~8ms per row, capped ~200ms total). Currently loads flash empty→populated. Important for slow/remote dirs. Touches src/components/FileRow.tsx/css — likely via a CSS animation with animation-delay computed from row index.
